title: Automated Resume Screening
scenario: Create a prompt to extract relevant information from resumes using natural language processing. The prompt should include a resume snippet and the desired output format. The target output should be a JSON object.
constraints: Must include a specific keyword extraction using regular expressions

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the extracted keywords match the desired keywords.
Verify if the generated JSON is syntactically valid.
Evaluate the JSON's formatting and readability.
